name: QA 067
description:
PCP QA Test No. 067

Test PMCD's ability to detect and cleanup agents it didn't create when they

terminate



Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos6 reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 067.out.bad)
5a6
> [Fri Aug  7 13:20:28] pmcd(50888) Error: Failed to create avahi client: Daemon not running
Check local PMCD is still alive ...

PMDA probe: pminfo -h 31bf4ba31c7a -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h 31bf4ba31c7a -f simple.numfetch
